title: melastoma rusticum
intro: Melastoma rusticum, also known as the terentang or terung pasir, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is a shrub native to Southeast Asia and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Melastoma rusticum include its ability to treat fever, headaches, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Melastoma rusticum may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
